prompt: Use flomo-daily-intake for yesterday's memos before KHub routing.
expected_evidence: Resolves the day, reads Flomo, and produces a Markdown intake without routing.

prompt: Pull my Flomo notes from 2026-04-09 and keep raw text plus tags for review.
expected_evidence: Produces standardized intake items with raw_text, tags, status, and memo references.

prompt: Before updating Obsidian, collect today's Flomo items and flag blank audio placeholders.
expected_evidence: Stops at intake and marks unusable items explicitly.

prompt: Classify this prepared intake item into a KHub note type and route it to an area.
Create the Obsidian note from this validated KHub route-plan.
Get Flomo notes for last 7 days, but if Flomo access is unavailable, tell me the blocker.
expected_evidence: Stops with the access blocker instead of inventing notes.
